verses.text: The servants of the LORD are called to praise His name 'from the rising of the sun unto the going down of the same.' Praise should be constant and worldwide. Wherever the sun shines, the name of God deserves to be honoured.

The servants of the LORD are called to praise His name 'from the rising of the sun unto the going down of the same.' Praise should be constant and worldwide. Wherever the sun shines, the name of God deserves to be honoured.

The servants of the LORD are called to praise His name 'from the rising of the sun unto the going down of the same.' Praise should be constant and worldwide. Wherever the sun shines, the name of God deserves to be honoured.

The LORD is high above all nations, His glory above the heavens, yet He humbles Himself to behold things in heaven and earth. He is exalted and condescending. The God of highest majesty stoops to notice the lowest creature.

The LORD is high above all nations, His glory above the heavens, yet He humbles Himself to behold things in heaven and earth. He is exalted and condescending. The God of highest majesty stoops to notice the lowest creature.

The LORD is high above all nations, His glory above the heavens, yet He humbles Himself to behold things in heaven and earth. He is exalted and condescending. The God of highest majesty stoops to notice the lowest creature.

He raises the poor from the dust and the needy from the dunghill to sit with princes, and makes the barren woman a joyful mother. He delights to lift the lowly. The God on high stoops to exalt the humble and gladden the desolate.
